title: Potato Chili (Tǔdòu làjiāo chǎo)

ingredients.title: Main
items: 1 scallion, chopped (white and green parts separated)

ingredients.title: Oil & seasoning
items: 1.5 tbsp neutral oil (peanut, sunflower, or canola)
Few drops sesame oil (optional for finish)

instruction.title: 1. Prep the Potatoes
steps: Peel and cut into fine matchsticks (around 3–4 mm thick).
Soak in cold water with 1/2 tsp vinegar for 10–15 minutes.
Optional: Blanch in boiling salted water for 30 seconds, then rinse in cold water and pat dry.

instruction.title: 3. Cook
steps: Heat wok over high heat until lightly smoking.
Add 1.5 tbsp oil. Toss in Sichuan peppercorns (if using) and dried red chili. Stir-fry 10 seconds.
Add garlic, ginger, and scallion whites. Stir-fry ~20 seconds.
Add green chilies and bell pepper. Cook 30 seconds until just softened.
Add potato strips. Stir-fry 1–2 minutes on high heat, keeping them crisp-tender.
Pour in sauce. Toss to coat evenly. Adjust salt to taste.
Finish with scallion greens and optional sesame oil drizzle.

chefTips: Serve as a standalone side, with steamed jasmine rice, or next to stir-fried tofu or meat.
